generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a fellow American who values our safety and freedom, I worry about how much we're relying on foreign tech for our critical infrastructure. Just last month, a small-town hospital's systems were compromised because their equipment ran on outdated Chinese software. We can't keep putting our national security at risk for the sake of short-term savings. It's time to invest in homegrown solutions, even if it means temporary adjustments. Our allies in Europe are already taking steps to reduce dependencies - shouldn't we do the same? #SecureOurFuture #AmericanTechFirst
